query:
INSERT INTO platform_changelog (version, title, description, feature_keys, change_type, impacted_roles) VALUES
('15.0', 'Intelligence Hub', 'New centralized dashboard for AI models, economic data analytics, and market intelligence. Access Monte Carlo simulations, debt optimization, tax projections, and more.', '["intelligence_hub"]', 'new_feature', '["professional", "manager", "admin"]'),
('15.0', 'Advisory Hub', 'Product catalog, case design tools, and recommendation engine for financial advisory workflows.', '["advisory_hub"]', 'new_feature', '["professional", "manager", "admin"]'),
('15.0', 'Relationships Hub', 'Contact management, meeting scheduling, and outreach campaign tools in one place.', '["relationships_hub"]', 'new_feature', '["professional", "manager", "admin"]'),
('15.0', 'Operations Hub', 'Track active work items, manage AI agents, review compliance, and view execution history.', '["operations_hub"]', 'new_feature', '["professional", "manager", "admin"]'),
('15.0', 'Voice Mode', 'Hands-free voice interaction with speech-to-text input and text-to-speech output. Use the microphone button or toggle read-aloud per message.', '["voice_mode"]', 'new_feature', '["user", "professional", "manager", "admin"]'),
('15.0', 'AI Tool Calling', 'The AI can now run financial calculators, search the web, and execute models directly from chat conversations.', '["calculators", "web_search"]', 'new_feature', '["user", "professional", "manager", "admin"]'),
('15.0', 'Follow-up Suggestions', 'After each AI response, contextual follow-up prompt pills help you continue the conversation naturally.', '["follow_up_suggestions"]', 'new_feature', '["user", "professional", "manager", "admin"]'),
('15.0', 'Data Integrations', 'Connect 30 data sources including Plaid, FRED, BLS, Salesforce, HubSpot, and more to enrich AI context.', '["integrations"]', 'new_feature', '["user", "professional", "manager", "admin"]'),
('15.0', 'AI Memory', 'The AI now remembers facts, preferences, and context from your past conversations to provide increasingly personalized guidance.', '["memory"]', 'new_feature', '["user", "professional", "manager", "admin"]'),
('15.0', 'Focus Modes', 'Switch between General, Financial, and Study focus modes to adjust the AI expertise and response style.', '["focus_mode"]', 'new_feature', '["user", "professional", "manager", "admin"]'),
('16.0', 'Exponential Learning Engine', 'The AI now tracks your platform usage and adapts its guidance based on your proficiency level. New users get onboarding help, experienced users get advanced tips.', '["chat"]', 'new_feature', '["user", "professional", "manager", "admin"]');
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3S2TaCfAdzc6QNm.b8cc9e16633a --database GaKEFERPH576tbv5NzvkMD --execute
